# 是 Ray 不是 Array (English — full index)

> 👨‍💻 嗨！我是 Ray，一個不想被當成 Array 的軟體工程師。這裡匯集了我的技術筆記與實戰心得。我相信透過分享不僅能幫助他人，也能讓自己在軟體開發的路上更加堅定。

## About
- [Ray](https://israynotarray.com/en/about/): Software Engineer — author of 是 Ray 不是 Array

## Categories
- [Nodejs](https://israynotarray.com/categories/nodejs/): 32 posts
- [AI](https://israynotarray.com/categories/ai/): 27 posts
- [Misc](https://israynotarray.com/categories/Misc/): 21 posts
- [Learning](https://israynotarray.com/categories/Learning/): 3 posts
- [Git](https://israynotarray.com/categories/git/): 2 posts
- [JavaScript](https://israynotarray.com/categories/javascript/): 2 posts

## All Posts (grouped by category)
